title: DigestReady
description: Payload for navi.{env}.events.digest.ready. Published by digest/summarizer when a digest record has been written to Postgres and is ready for delivery.

digest_id.description: UUID v4 of the digest record in the digests table.

digest_type.description: Type of digest. Determines the coverage window and the summarization prompt used.

date.description: Coverage date for daily digests (YYYY-MM-DD); end date of the coverage window for weekly and monthly digests.

article_count.description: Number of articles included in this digest. May be 0 for a thin digest (no articles met the relevance threshold); the digest is still delivered with a note.

generated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when the digest record was written to Postgres.

degraded.description: True if the digest was generated without Claude summaries (ErrBudgetExceeded or API unavailable). When true, content_html in the digests table contains raw headlines and source URLs with a degraded-mode header. Delivery proceeds normally.
